name: Karan Joshi
summary: Product Designer with 3 years of experience crafting award-winning digital experiences for SaaS, fintech, and consumer apps. Led end-to-end design for a mobile app with 2.5M+ downloads and a B2B dashboard used by 3,000+ enterprise users. Expert in Figma, design systems, and research-led design. Passionate about accessible, inclusive design that performs beautifully on every device.

experience.title: Product Designer (UI/UX)
responsibilities: Led end-to-end UX for Slice's card management and rewards product used by 2.5M+ monthly active users.
Built and maintained Slice Design System — 120+ components in Figma, adopted across 4 product squads (8 designers).
Reduced onboarding drop-off by 38% through a complete redesign of the KYC flow based on 25 user interviews and 3 usability tests.
Designed accessible UX (WCAG 2.1 AA) for low-literacy users — tap target optimization, icon-first navigation — leading to 22% increase in rural user retention.
Launched Slice Rewards Hub: 0-to-1 design from research → prototype → shipped in 8 weeks. Feature adopted by 68% of active users.
Conducted monthly design crits with cross-functional team; established design review framework adopted company-wide.

experience.title: UI/UX Designer (Junior)
responsibilities: Designed 3 client web apps (edtech, healthcare, e-commerce) from wireframe to hi-fi Figma prototypes.
Conducted usability tests with 5–7 users per project; iterated on 2-week design sprints.
Contributed 30+ reusable components to agency's shared design library.

design_tools: Figma (Expert: Auto Layout v5, Variables, Dev Mode, Branching)

projects.name: Slice Rewards Hub — Case Study
projects.description: 0-to-1 product design: Discovery (user interviews, competitive audit), IA, wireframing, visual design, prototype testing, launch. 68% adoption rate post-launch. Available on Behance with full case study.

projects.name: HealthTrack Dashboard — SaaS Design
projects.description: Designed complex data-heavy healthcare analytics dashboard for a Series A startup. Solved for cognitive overload through progressive disclosure and contextual data hierarchy. Figma Community featured file — 3,400 duplicates.

projects.name: AccessFirst Design System
projects.description: Open-source Figma design system built with WCAG 2.1 AA compliance from the ground up. Includes accessibility annotations, color token system, and component documentation. 2,100+ Figma duplicates.

achievements: Figma Community Most Duplicated File — AccessFirst Design System (2,100+ duplicates)
NID Design Award — Excellence in Interaction Design (Final Year Project 2021)
Slice All-Hands Innovation Award — KYC Redesign (Q3 2022)
